todo.title: Create your own project
todo.desc: Use the + button to add a project. Give it a short id prefix (like gs) so sticky ids stay readable.

todo.title: Try the API page
todo.desc: Open /api.html for the REST contract: scoped reads on GET /data and the op vocabulary on POST /op.
todo.notes: Every write is one transaction plus one audit row with full before/after snapshots.

inprogress.title: Drag this sticky to Done
inprogress.desc: Stickies drag between columns. Click a sticky to edit its title, description, and notes.
